session_focus: Distinguish a stale browser render from the live API truth while still fixing the visible UI.
user_directives: Distinguish a stale browser render from the live API truth while still fixing the visible UI.
assistant_responses: Verified through endpoints and then improved the rendered panels so the browser state stays obviously alive. Variant 55 preserves the conversation milestone as reusable training data rather than transient chat.
training_value: A stale browser can explain a mismatch, but it should not be an excuse for low-signal UI.

Screenshots sometimes lagged behind the served payload, but the user-visible problem was still real. Variant 55 reframes the same milestone through the lens of runtime verification, UI trust, and repo-backed data visibility.
